source: SARS PAYE Employer Reconciliation BRS v24.0
description: EMP201 is the Monthly Employer Declaration submitted to SARS by the 7th of the following month. It declares total PAYE, SDL, UIF, and ETI amounts for the period.
format: CSV import into e@syFile (not submitted as raw CSV to SARS)
due_date: 7th of the month following the payment month

declaration_fields.description: First day of the payment period
Last day of the payment period
Total PAYE deducted from all employees for the period
Total SDL payable by employer for the period
Total UIF (employer + employee) for the period
Total ETI claimed for the period (reduces PAYE liability)
Net PAYE + SDL + UIF = total amount payable to SARS
Total number of employees paid in the period

validation_rules: net_paye_payable = total_paye - total_eti (ETI reduces PAYE liability)
total_uif includes both employer and employee portions
total_eti cannot exceed total_paye (PAYE liability floor is zero after ETI)
If ETI exceeds PAYE, excess rolls over to next period
Period must be a valid calendar month

payment.interest: Charged from due date until payment
